memoryArtifacts.headline: Sir Nicholas de Radcliffe, Knight
memoryArtifacts.description:
About Sir Nicholas de Radcliffe, Knight

The Ratcliff family in Lancashire, England, descended from Sir Nicholas FitzGilbert de Tailbois (Talbot). His great-grandfather, Ivo de Tailbois [Taillebois], …

zh.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive是Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster的兒子，於1125年出生在英國藍卡爾。他於大約1139年與Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes在英國英格蘭藍卡爾拉德克利夫結婚。他去世於1200年在英國藍卡爾波利享年75歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive是Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster的儿子，于1125年出生在英国藍卡爾。他于大约1139年与Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes在英国英格兰藍卡爾拉德克利夫结婚。他去世于1200年在英国藍卡爾波利享年75岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive was born in 1125, in Lancashire, England as the son of Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster. He married Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes about 1139, in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. He died in 1200, in Bury, Lancashire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive est né en 1125, à Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster. Il a épousé Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes environ 1139, à Radcliffe, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé en 1200, à Bury, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive wurde 1125 in Lancashire, England, als Sohn von Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster geboren. Er hat um 1139 in Radcliffe, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes geheiratet. Er starb 1200 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Bury, Lancashire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive è nato il nel 1125 nel Lancashire, England come figlio di Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster. Lui sposato Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes circa 1139, nel Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì nel 1200, nel Bury, Lancashire, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radecliveは1125年にイギリスランカシュアイアでGilbert Fitz ketel de Lancasterの息子として生まれた。約1139年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアラドクリフでDame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothesと結婚した。彼は1200年にイギリスランカシュアイアブリーで75歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive(은)는 1125년 영국 랭카실르에서 Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1139년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 라드c리프에서 Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1200년 영국 랭카실르 버이에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mn.Radcliffe Manor, Bury, Lancashire, Engla: Radcliffe, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive nasceu em 1125, em Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster. Ele casou-se com Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes aproximadamente 1139, em Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1200, em Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive родился в 1125 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия. Его отца звали Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster. Он женился на женщине по имени Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes около 1139 г. в местности радклифф, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер в 1200 г. в местности бури, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas fitzGilbert of Radeclive nació en 1125, en Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de Gilbert Fitz ketel de Lancaster. Se casó con Dame Jeanne Marguérite des Boothes aproximadamente 1139, en Radcliffe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió en 1200, en Bury, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
